violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Single use trays sitting on floor in dry storage.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Box of liver opened and sitting on floor in walk in freezer.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. -Wet cloth on prep table by upright freezer.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean shelf above prep line. -Clean shelf by 1 door freezer in kitchen.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Was not emitting sanitizer solution.

Backflow prevention. — --Direct connection existed between the sewage system and drain originating from equipment in which food, portable equipment/utensils are placed. -Raise drain pipe for ice machine so it sits above the plain of the floor drain.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors need more thorough cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Floors have cracks in tiles in kitchen and dishwash area.
